product.pinsToml:
capabilities = [
  "automation/start",
  "automation/steerIssue",
  "host/framedStdio",
  "host/replay",
  "host/snapshot",
  "orchestra/query",
  "orchestra/threadItem",
  "orchestra/worldState",
  "thread/read",
]

[product]
version = "0.2.0-dev"
minimum_macos = "13.0"

[sources]
orchestra_codex = "7fddc000e0531657002ec4fac59f5edbabb4695b"
orchestra_codex_tree = "b1306b462645553d975b21f872ddc4ca75310f20"
orchestra_codex_repository = "https://github.com/edgefloor/orchestra-codex.git"
codex_upstream = "f90e7deea6a715bbd153044af6f475eefa749177"
codex_upstream_tree = "1e83e292b90e89d993703d08f05fb8579601bda2"
codex_upstream_repository = "https://github.com/openai/codex.git"
orchestra_core_repository = "https://github.com/edgefloor/codex-orchestra.git"
orchestra_core_revision = "86d1b8f66b87b3ebc52d3b88ecea8b964fd2da28"
orchestra_core_tree = "5a9968a98df00848317b127c61d659781ef7e8fc"
orchestra_desktop = "511d26606a3316a1612348535450840be54fcafa"
orchestra_desktop_tree = "70989e1c0c6222706b0b1e6380ef18660833665f"
orchestra_desktop_repository = "https://github.com/edgefloor/orchestra-desktop.git"
t3code_upstream = "ecb35f75839925dd1ac6f854efeef5c9e291d11b"
t3code_upstream_tree = "147cfa26a60049c8b89f836b3c4fdb474906b6a7"
t3code_upstream_repository = "https://github.com/pingdotgg/t3code.git"
protocol_tree = "05796f62e38db8788e5277a4a280d950bd57a017"
protocol_digest_algorithm = "sha256-relative-path-nul-file-sha256-lf-v1"
protocol_digest = "98196f8e520f6560a3933ae7db30480b210d3d8b5818849d61a4f040d10d6655"
protocol_file_count = "709"
agents = "4e1f842f63673db59018a7fa4a441c64c274caf2"
zod = "1fb56a5c18c27102dbc92260a4007c7732a0ccca"
zod_repository = "https://github.com/colinhacks/zod.git"
zod_version = "4.4.3"
zod_package_revision = "f3c9ec03ba7a28ae72d25cc295f38674bee0f559"
zod_package_integrity = "sha512-ytENFjIJFl2UwYglde2jchW2Hwm4GJFLDiSXWdTrJQBIN9Fcyp7n4DhxJEiWNAJMV1/BqWfW/kkg71UDcHJyTQ=="
zod_package_shasum = "b680f172885d18bbebf21a834ea25e55a1bbf356"
bun = "0d9b296af33f2b851fcbf4df3e9ec89751734ba4"
bun_repository = "https://github.com/oven-sh/bun.git"
bun_version = "1.3.14"
evaluator_worker_source_sha256 = "169c4a10c0631a33f94c4bda6307f1d552bd7cc4db1da3b907b63df4847f4287"
evaluator_lock_sha256 = "c699079c216b7479aaf59d7856d9e7762a5b70ada858702a6034afd59bd33d1c"
evaluator_package_sha256 = "471a1072db06bcb66aed6e8a6d215506a7fdc2169fb47295fc6154c2c83852c2"

[schemas]
protocol = "codex-app-server+orchestra-v1"
snapshot = "orchestra-task-snapshot-v1"

[evaluator]
revision = "bun-1.3.14-zod-4.4.3-sealed-2"
adapter_abi = "orchestra-evaluator-abi-v1"
canonicalizer = "rfc8785-jcs-v1"
issue_format = "orchestra-validation-issues-v1"

[limits]
frame_bytes = 65536
delivery_queue = 4
replay_batch = 32
replay_tail = 1024
workflow_source_bytes = 4194304
workflow_module_count = 256
workflow_module_source_bytes = 1048576
validation_request_bytes = 2097152
validation_response_bytes = 2097152
validation_bundle_bytes = 1048576
validation_value_bytes = 1048576
validation_value_depth = 64
validation_value_nodes = 100000
validation_collection_entries = 10000
validation_string_bytes = 262144
validation_issue_count = 128
validation_issue_text_bytes = 512
validation_wall_ms = 1000

scenarios.notes: Observed the complete dark desktop composition: the active task, completed workflow, changed-files tree, composer, browser tabs, controls, address bar, and guest webview remain legible without unintended overlap or clipping.
Observed the complete light desktop composition: task and workflow content retain clear hierarchy and contrast while the browser surface remains fully bounded, readable, and visually distinct.
Observed the dark narrow layout: the right drawer is correctly layered and bounded, its Diff tabs and controls are legible, and the dimmed active task remains identifiable behind the overlay.
Observed the light narrow layout: the drawer boundary, active Diff tab, toolbar, and empty-state message are clear, while the task sidebar and underlying workflow context preserve continuity.
